evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Monitorer la qualité des données (complétude, cohérence, fiabilité, disponibilité, etc…)
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals ("monitorer la qualité", "fiabilité") appear alongside growth/velocity framing ("scale-up rentable en forte croissance", "environnement dynamique") in roughly equal measure, producing a mixed classification.
evidence.domain_risk: rendre la donnée disponible, fiable et actionnable pour optimiser nos performances
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The company is a property-tax SaaS platform but the JD contains no explicit financial-reporting, audit, or regulatory language in the responsibilities — errors affect business performance decisions, not regulated outcomes, so moderate applies.
evidence.collaboration_width: équipes métiers; Head of Data & Performance; marketing → sales → finance
evidence.data_team_maturity: Ownership progressif de la stack data ... A partir du 3eme mois : Ownership complet de la stack data. Tu es l'interlocuteur principal pour les sujets data
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The new hire is expected to become the sole primary contact for data within three months and propose foundational governance/architecture improvements, signalling the data function is still being established rather than operating at scale.
evidence.jd_authorship: Améliorer et pérenniser nos pipelines ELT. Concevoir et enrichir des tables de données dans notre datawarehouse... Créer des dashboards dans Metabase
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Responsibilities name precise tools (Snowflake, Airbyte, DBT Cloud, Metabase, Github) and concrete deliverables, letting the reader understand exactly what the role does day to day.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Accompagner les équipes dans la compréhension et l'exploitation des données
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves internal business teams broadly ("équipes métiers") through dashboards and data quality rather than a specific commercial, product, or finance function, placing it in internal_data.
evidence.autonomy_level: A partir du 3eme mois : Ownership complet de la stack data ... Proposition d'améliorations structurantes (architecture, modélisation, gouvernance)
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role progresses from onboarding and simple contributions to full ownership and structural improvement proposals — early months are execution-scoped, later months are strategic, making this genuinely mixed.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The JD contains no mention of AI tools, AI-assisted coding, or AI-consuming data infrastructure anywhere in the text.
evidence.testing_framing: Monitorer la qualité des données (complétude, cohérence, fiabilité, disponibilité, etc…)
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality monitoring is listed as an owned responsibility within the Data Engineering mission, not merely a tool in a skills list.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Monitorer la qualité des données (complétude, cohérence, fiabilité, disponibilité, etc…)
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Reliability and data quality are named as an operational concern but are secondary to delivery-oriented growth framing throughout the JD, placing this at moderate.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Améliorer et pérenniser nos pipelines ELT ... Concevoir et enrichir des tables de données dans notre datawarehouse pour répondre aux besoins métiers et anticiper les évolutions
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role both improves/sustains existing ELT pipelines (fix_scale) and designs new enriched tables and proposes new architecture/governance (greenfield), producing a mixed signal.
evidence.loss_aversion: Monitorer la qualité des données (complétude, cohérence, fiabilité, disponibilité, etc…) — reliability is named but framed as one engineering task among several delivery-oriented missions, not a dominant risk register.
